Name: FMovementProperties
Description: Movement capabilities, determining available movement options for Pawns and used by AI for reachability tests.

Variables.Name: bCanCrouch
Variables.Description: If true, this Pawn is capable of crouching.

Variables.Name: bCanJump
Variables.Description: If true, this Pawn is capable of jumping.

Variables.Name: bCanWalk
Variables.Description: If true, this Pawn is capable of walking or moving on the ground.

Variables.Name: bCanSwim
Variables.Description: If true, this Pawn is capable of swimming or moving through fluid volumes.

Variables.Name: bCanFly
Variables.Description: If true, this Pawn is capable of flying.
